falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend reversal, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% of the 30-day average daily volume within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge would signal massive market participation and potential trend exhaustion, invalidating the 'HOLD' by proving the pattern is not a bottom but a blowoff top.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) exceeds 70 for 3 consecutive days within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm overbought conditions, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and proving the pattern is not a valid bottom but a false breakout.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
